$comment: Selector registry — the ONE place brittle UI strings live. Flows never
reference raw copy; they reference these @anchor keys (see qa/journey.json).
Each anchor resolves to a Maestro selector, testID preferred:
{ "text": "Add packer" }       Maestro regex; matches visible text OR a11y label.
{ "testID": "x", "text": "y" } both — testID wins, text is the healer's hint.
When copy moves, fix the anchor here (one line), re-run compile-flow.mjs.
When you don't know what moved, run heal.mjs — it rewrites these from the
live screen. Add a testID to any anchor that churns often to stop the churn.
